error_signature: input reverts to previous text after update
title: Input value reverts after JavaScript update
symptom: After updating an input's value via JavaScript, the input reverts to its previous value when clicked. This occurs in a collection of items managed by Vue.
not_this_if: Input values are bound to a variable correctly
root_cause: Vue manages the internal state of inputs, and direct DOM manipulation via JavaScript does not update Vue's internal state. When Vue re-renders the input, it uses the last known value from its state, not the value set directly through JavaScript.
fix_steps: Bind the input value to a Vue variable
Update the Vue variable instead of manipulating the DOM directly
Ensure the input reflects the updated variable value
agent_instruction: Bind the input value to a variable in Vue and update that variable to reset the input.
